creator: pprocacci@gmail.com
text:
This is happening to me as well.
I just updated to the latest version available and have lost my full screen.

Options:
	DBUS           : on
	DEBUG          : off
	OPENGL         : off
	X11            : on

I'm @ revision 420490.

For testing, I used  a clean/new VM and follow'd these steps:

1) Install BSD
2) Install xorg
3) Install slim
5) Install virtualbox-ose-addition

*Note - All default options.

5) edit /etc/rc.conf to have slim start on boot
6) Reboot

Problem:  800x600
